Work With Me

I take on engagements that require deep engineering – trading infrastructure, fintech platforms, multi‑platform data‑integrity layers, and any system where correctness matters.

Does NOT fit: simple brochure sites, generic marketing pages, or projects outside the engineering depth described above.
